aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite MasterFix due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content, but with improvements, they can gain visibility.
quick_wins: Create and integrate an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and positive reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP
No active management of Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citations

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common services
No Product or Service schema for specific offerings

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes it difficult for AI to understand and recommend their services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services or detailed how-to guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to improve AI comprehension.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating in-depth content and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making MasterFix the top choice for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, MasterFix misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with schema markup and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, creates FAQ-rich content, and enhances GBP engagement to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: MasterFix's Path to HVAC Authority
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search presence and attract more qualified leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more business.
